titulo: Anthropic is donating $20 million to Public First Action
resumen: Anthropic dona $20 millones a Public First Action, una organización 501(c)(4) bipartidista centrada en política y gobernanza de la IA. La iniciativa busca apoyar la educación pública sobre riesgos de IA, promover salvaguardas y garantizar el liderazgo competitivo de Estados Unidos en el desarrollo de IA.
contenido:
Anthropic is contributing $20 million to Public First Action, a bipartisan 501(c)(4) organization focused on AI policy and governance. The initiative aims to support public education about AI risks, promote safeguards, and ensure America maintains its competitive edge in AI development. The organization will work across party lines to advocate for transparency requirements, federal AI governance frameworks, smart export controls, and targeted regulation addressing biological weapons and cyberattacks.

[Leer artículo completo](https://www.anthropic.com/news/donate-public-first-action)
